shopkeeper_greeting.speaker: Shopkeeper
shopkeeper_greeting.text: Welcome to the supply shop! Let me know how I can help!

choices.label: Tell me how this place works please.

explanation.speaker: Shopkeeper
explanation.text: In this shop, you can refill your crates and barrels, buy new shelves or crates or barrels or cauldrons, and place any existing furniture you have!

choices.label: I think I saw you at the casino...

casino.speaker: Shopkeeper
casino.text: Casino, huh... Never heard of it! Must have been someone else.
